positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_problem
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~grew_up_health_conscious(taylor)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~disregards_well_being(taylor)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~eats_salads(taylor)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~eats_salads(X0) | health_conscious(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~disregards_well_being(X0) | ~health_conscious(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~grew_up_health_conscious(X0) | eats_salads(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define fulfills_nutritional_intake(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define visits_gym_daily(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
